name: BOC International (China) Company Limited - Boc Sci Tech Innvt 3Y Mixed Fund
summary: BOC International (China) Company Limited - Boc Sci Tech Innvt 3Y Mixed Fund is a fund managed by BOC International (China) that invests in a mix of stocks and bonds of companies involved in science and technology innovation with a three-year investment horizon. The fund aims to achieve long-term capital appreciation while managing risk through diversification and a strategic investment approach.
